candidate_metadata.angle_representation: two-product high/low retained through split-2pi reduction
candidate_metadata.arithmetic_path: single Tensix compute core with FP32 SFPU
candidate_metadata.fma_mode: audited and compile-probed; rejected for quantized product residual
candidate_metadata.magnitude_compensation: none; ordinary FP32 r2 and sqrt retained
candidate_metadata.output_layout: six component-planar Float32 tiles restored to row-major [B,K,*]
candidate_metadata.product_mode: Dekker split TwoProduct with 4097 FP32 splitter
candidate_metadata.sfpu_cosine_mode: native Wormhole cos_tile with pinned four-stage Cody-Waite reduction
candidate_metadata.sfpu_sine_mode: native Wormhole sin_tile with pinned four-stage Cody-Waite reduction
candidate_metadata.zero_mask_strategy: eqz(r2), SFPI FP32 select r->1 before reciprocal, identity output select
